title: Search intent mapping
description: Intent should be classified before recommending page type.
do: Classify intent before recommending page type.
Identify informational, commercial, transactional, navigational, local, comparison, pricing, product-led, and support intent.
Recommend page type based on intent.
dont: Assume intent only from keyword volume.
Create service pages for purely informational queries.
Create blog posts for transactional queries.
Mix conflicting intents on one page.
